rationale: The one substantive ground-truth concern (yenuo26 asking about verifying the reduce_scatter fix alongside device_communicator) is only echoed by Y, which explicitly notes the new coordinators own both device_communicator and reduce_scatter as the core fix rationale; X never mentions reduce_scatter in its actual review text. X's report is also degraded by duplicated identical review_text blocks, leaked internal failure state (iteration limit exhausted, low confidence, a 'dropped candidate'), signaling an incomplete/broken run, though its single nit (improve RuntimeError message with rank indices) is valid and concretely actionable. Y delivers a coherent, well-verified review (DPMetadata construction, device_communicator semantics, cleanup/destroy correctness) with an honest sandbox caveat and one grounded non-blocking comment, making it the more trustworthy and higher-quality deliverable overall.
